description_long: This is a well-used claw hammer featuring a black, slightly textured handle and a metallic head. The handle appears to be coated in a rubberized material, showing signs of wear and some white scuff marks, likely from repeated use. The head is made of metal, with a classic dual-purpose design: one side is a flat striking face for driving nails, while the other side features a curved claw for prying and removing nails. Rust and discoloration are visible at the junction between the handle and the head, indicating age and exposure to the elements. The hammer's overall proportions are typical for a hand tool, with a handle long enough for a comfortable grip and a head robust enough for effective striking. No visible branding or additional attachments are present on the tool.
description: A worn black-handled claw hammer with a metal head, showing scuffs and rust, and a classic curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hammer's head with the striking face and the curved claw clearly visible, handle appears straight and worn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the handle, the metal shaft, and the profile of the hammer head with both the striking face and claw.
description_view_2: Top-down view focusing on the width of the hammer head and the curvature of the claw, with the handle extending away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the handle and head, with visible wear and the claw's curvature.
attribute_handle_type: Rubberized straight handle with a slightly textured, grippy surface and visible wear marks.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the other, made of steel.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible scuffs, scratches, white marks on the handle, and rust/discoloration at the head-handle junction.
